name: Overnight
detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 2am and 3am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers between 3am and 4am, then a chance of rain showers and patchy fog between 4am and 5am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers. Cloudy, with a low around 37. Southeast wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
